speaker: MATT
raw_text: Technology. As you guys continue running forward, you go past two city streets. The whole city's dark now, it's closed down in preparation for what this evening is going to entail. So you go past these two streets to the left. Immediately, you hear the familiar sound of a large, heavy mass slamming into the ground, and as soon as you turn the corner you can see there are three people left in this one resistance brigade. There is a pile of wounded and/or killed soldiers around its feet, and it looks like it's been nearly untouched. This one apparently got the drop on them or at least they weren't fully prepared for what they were up against, and it's just swinging this giant club in the air around towards them. They're all kind of keeping their distance, not knowing if they should run or keep fighting. As you just turn around the corner, I want you guys to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 23? Okay, so as you reach forward, he looks up at you like he's seeing an angel walk towards him and looks scared. He's like, "No, not yet. Not yet!" And as you reach forward and touch the sides of his face with your smile of mercy and understanding, your warm hands touch the sides of his head, and the energy of Sarenrae's blessing pours through his body. You can see the insides of his armor begin to give this soft glow from where the wounds are as they close up. You can see the large gash in his side begin to stitch itself up magically, and at that point he takes a deep breath for a second and kind of turns over and is now in sitting position, breathing heavily, looking around himself, confused. "You... you're an angel. A bloody right angel."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He reaches out for you with his hand forward. "Thank you."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He gets up and he still seems sore and bruised and there's still wounds across his body, but he's no longer on the path to terminal loss of his life. He stands up. "Okay. Okay. Thank you."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, I intend to." And he reaches over in the mud and finds his sword, wipes it off from the side, (war cry) turns around and rushes back in to the rest of his allies.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I pick Pike back up, put her on my shoulder, and we keep running.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you guys go charging back into the storm from the south side. (Skype sound)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: However, many of them being armored and armed means it wasn't a direct transition. They were probably pulled from here and given weapons elsewhere. But that's the first thought that catches your attention as you rush in here. Rain pouring down, the clapping of thunder in the distance. You can see, there are six of these soldiers that are currently hacking away at this one giant that's being pushed up towards the edge of the temple right now. It looks like it's cornered, but it's lashing out like a wild animal. Roll initiative, folks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. What's the range on Hunter's Mark?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's a good question. It doesn't say.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 90 feet. You're probably going to have to get a little bit closer.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I Hunter's Mark him as soon as I can.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, good to know. You guys all going stealth right now, or are you all rushing in?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm just going to rush in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, let's run. I'm just running. Keyleth's running.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. The gates are slammed open; part of the metal's bent inward, like whatever was pushing the giant back at this point had slammed through the gate.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I rolled a 23. Am I stealthed?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You have an earring, though. If he's on his ass, you have a better chance of hitting him, correct?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so as you guys all rush into the center here, looking about, you can see, this hefty graveyard that you visited about two days ago: all of the graves are open. All of them are excavated and open, and you're starting to see where they're pulling a lot of these undead from.
